final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign named "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, luxurious quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the focal point
Subject: must include the "染秋" fragrance new product launch theme, with the title prominently highlighted
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere fitting the "染秋" fragrance theme — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, premium atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking autumn warmth and high-end elegance — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a luxurious surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" (large, primary, prominent)
Constraints: must preserve 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title must be visually dominant
Avoid:
